sections.heading: These Regulations apply to a person who applies for a licence Application
An applicant shall submit, to the Authority, an application in Licence fee
sections.text:
respect of the relevant radiocommunication service the applicant
intends to operate, accompanied by a licence fee set out in the First
Schedule.
